mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_operation_log WHERE operator_id = #{operatorId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_operation_log WHERE operation_type = #{operationType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_operation_log WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
